articles.title: The attack really makes you cry. Milan without courage. Allegri made everything clear
articles.summary: So it's really bad. Losing without even trying can't be a good message.

articles.title: De Winter after Napoli: "The ranking can be seen at the end. Did we believe in the scudetto? Dreaming is free..."

articles.title: The QS on the front page after Napoli-Milan: "Conte at Max, Diavolo knocked out"
articles.summary: A bad, very bad defeat for Milan. The Devil lost 1-0 at Maradona against Napoli and saw his championship hopes slip further and further away.

articles.title: The Devil defeated in Naples. CorSport: "Milan without goals"
articles.summary: A very bitter defeat for Milan, who narrowly lost to Maradona against Napoli. The championship hopes are now increasingly distant.

articles.title: Milan knocked out in Naples. Tuttosport and Allegri's words: "Let's defend our place in the Champions League"
articles.summary: Milan loses 1-0 in Naples and, for the moment, also says goodbye to second place in the standings. In fact, the Rossoneri were overtaken by the Azzurri.

articles.title: Scudetto race, Napoli eliminates Milan. The opening of the Gazzetta: "Inter, Conte remains"
articles.summary: With yesterday's victory thanks to a goal from Politano, Napoli effectively eliminated Milan from the championship race. Today's edition of the Gazzetta dello Sport opened like this on the front page this morning: "Inter, Conte remains".

articles.title: Two defeats in a row away from home without scoring. Allegri: "We need to improve and find some players like Gimenez, Leao and Pulisic"
articles.summary: Mister Massimiliano Allegri spoke to TeleLombardia after Maradona's defeat against Napoli.

articles.title: Milan says goodbye to the Scudetto dream. Now the Champions League place must be secured
articles.summary: With yesterday's defeat on the Napoli pitch, the third in the last six championship days, Milan unfortunately has to say goodbye to their Scudetto dream.

articles.title: Conte: "It's right that I'm on the list to become Italy coach"
articles.summary: (ANSA) - NAPLES, APRIL 06 - "It is right that my name is part of that squad for the national team, together with others I would put it in the list of candidates if I led the federation".

articles.summary: Strahinja Pavlovic released these words to Milan TV after the defeat at Napoli: "We're sorry, maybe we didn't deserve the three points, but we didn't deserve to lose either.

articles.title: Report: Napoli dealt huge blow as Hojlund could miss Milan clash
